name: Curio Collection by Hilton
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Item 19 Room Rate range for 2023 (.86-.25) is inconsistent with stated average (.91). Average exceeds range max, which is arithmetically impossible for a true min-max range. May be typographical error

Item 20 Table 3 "Ceased Operations - Other Reasons" column shows positive values for 5 states in 2024 (AZ, CO, FL, MA, VT). Column header implies cessations but values suggest hotels entering the syst
Exhibit D-1 (State Addenda to Franchise Agreement) located at approximately pages 170-199 within Exhibit D, but material overrides not yet structured per-state. Deferred to depth pass.
2023 Room Rate range max (.25) is below stated 2023 average (.91). An average above the range maximum is impossible. The 2024 figures are internally consistent. Likely typographical error in FDD.
Note 9 subsequent events evaluation date stated as March 18, 2024 but should be March 18, 2025 given the 2024 financial statements. Likely typographical error.
